content.en:
Just when Ye Tian was about to leave Zi Lan Mountain, a group of Zi Lan guards appeared, but they did not surround Ye Tian, ​​but lined up in two rows.

Then, a young man in black armor walked out of the void.

"Mountain Master!"

One by one, the Zi Lan guards said respectfully.

The visitor was the master of Zi Lan Mountain, the eighth-level strong man of the thirteenth heaven.

"Young friend, can you talk?"

The master of Zi Lan Mountain asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He was not afraid of the master of Zi Lan Mountain. The reason why he did not refuse was that he wanted to learn more information from the master of Zi Lan Mountain.

Immediately, the master of Zi Lan Mountain invited Ye Tian to enter a magnificent palace on the top of Zi Lan Mountain. This was the residence of the master of Zi Lan Mountain.

As soon as he sat down, the master of Zi Lan Mountain ordered two charming maids to come over and make tea.

These two maids were not ordinary cultivators either. They were all cultivators of the eighth heaven. In ordinary forces, they would be ancestors, but under the master of Zi Lan Mountain, they were just maids.

"Master of Zi Lan Mountain, what is the matter with inviting me?"

Ye Tian asked indifferently.

The master of Zi Lan Mountain picked up a cup of tea, took a sip, and then asked curiously: "You should not be a cultivator of Zi Lan Mountain, of course your body is, but your soul should not be."

Just a moment ago, all the information of Ye Tian had been transmitted to the mind of the master of Zi Lan Mountain.

He knew very well that Ye Tian could not have suddenly become powerful because of some inheritance. No one could suddenly grow so fast, and even if he had obtained the inheritance, that kind of arrogant temperament could not be simulated.

Besides, he could sense that Ye Tian's state of mind was very high, and he couldn't guess that.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian didn't refute.

The owner of Zi Lan Mountain asked again: "I'm curious, where are you from?"

"The Sea of ​​Dimensions!"

Ye Tian said.

He didn't lie, but the Sea of ​​Dimensions was not in this time and space line, and the owner of Zi Lan Mountain couldn't guess it because his level was too low.

"The Sea of ​​Dimensions?"

The owner of Zi Lan Mountain had never heard of it, and didn't continue to ask about it.

He added: "Sir, your true cultivation level should be the ninth heaven, but you can easily kill a ninth heaven warrior in seconds. You should be practicing some kind of emperor-level Chonggong technique. I am very interested in your technique. Can you trade it to me?"

The technique that the master of Zi Lan Mountain practices belongs to the peak heaven-level Chonggong technique. It is difficult to continue to improve after practicing to the thirteenth heaven. He has also been to many places, but he has never obtained the emperor-level Chonggong technique.

The emperor-level Chonggong technique is almost in the hands of some warriors above the fifteenth heaven, and he has no way to obtain it.

Now, he finally sees hope.

"Trade the emperor-level Chonggong technique, I wonder what the master of Zi Lan Mountain can offer?"Ye Tian asked.

The master of Zi Lan Mountain was speechless. He knew the value of an emperor-level Chonggong technique. Even if he had all his wealth, he would not be able to trade for an emperor-level Chonggong technique.

"If you don't trade, I'm afraid you won't be able to leave here!"

The master of Zi Lan Mountain thought, and the formation in the palace was activated, and a murderous intent enveloped Ye Tian.

Obviously, the master of Zi Lan Mountain wanted to rob.

Ye Tian might be a powerful person, but his cultivation was only the ninth level. How could he defeat him, a thirteenth level eighth level strongman? Even the emperor-level Chonggong and the emperor-level Chonggong secret method could not do it.

So, he was not afraid of Ye Tian at all.

In his opinion, if Ye Tian didn't want to die, he had to hand over the emperor-level Chonggong secret method.

"Master of Zi Lan Mountain, you made a wrong choice! "Ye Tian said coldly.

"Hahaha, wrong choice?" The master of Zi Lan Mountain sneered, "This is Zi Lan Mountain, my territory. You are only the ninth level, and I am the thirteenth level. You should not be exposed so early. If you break through to the eleventh level, I may not dare to attack you when you are exposed, but now, you have no right to resist."

"I wanted to get some information from you, but now it seems unnecessary!" Ye Tian said, and took action directly.

Boom!!!!

The extreme blood armor wrapped his whole body, and then he used the extreme blood blade to slash at the master of Zi Lan Mountain.

The master of Zi Lan Mountain almost didn't react, but still relied on the formation to stack layers of defense in front of him, but they were all torn apart by Ye Tian's extreme blood blade.

Then, the extreme blood blade left a wound on the master of Zi Lan Mountain. ......

Boom! ! ! !

The battle broke out, and the aftermath directly shattered the two maids and the Purple Mist Guards who were guarding nearby.

Next, Ye Tian and the owner of Purple Mist Mountain had an amazing battle, and their battle attracted the attention of all the cultivators in the entire Purple Mist Mountain.

Boom! ! ! !

Ye Tian exploded with all his means, whether it was speed, attack, or defense, he was better than the owner of Purple Mist Mountain.

The owner of Purple Mist Mountain was undoubtedly a very poor thirteenth-level cultivator. After all, he did not have any powerful inheritance, and in order to improve his strength, he also adopted a lot of methods to force growth, so his combat effectiveness was naturally poor.

Boom!

Ye Tian slashed with a blow, directly blasting the owner of Purple Mist Mountain away, leaving scars on his body.

……

"What, the owner of Purple Mist Mountain was injured, who is that, it seems that he only has the ninth-level cultivation, how could he injure the owner of Purple Mist Mountain? ”

All the cultivators were shocked.

Inside Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

Xiao He and Xiao Ya stood together, and they were also shocked.

“Grandmaster, is that Master Ye?” Xiao Ya asked.

“It’s Master Ye!” Xiao He nodded slightly, and he was also confused at this moment.He knew Ye Tian was very powerful, but the Lord of Zi Lan Mountain was a great power of the thirteenth heaven. It was unreasonable that he could not beat Ye Tian of the ninth heaven!

Besides, why did Ye Tian suddenly fight with the Lord of Zi Lan Mountain?

Suddenly, he thought of a possibility - chance!

The Lord of Zi Lan Mountain must have thought that Ye Tian had something good, so he attacked Ye Tian, ​​and that's why the fight broke out.

Now it seems that the Lord of Zi Lan Mountain is not an opponent, and those Zi Lan guards can't intervene in this level of battle.

...

"Puff!"

The Lord of Zi Lan Mountain kept vomiting blood.

He looked at Ye Tian in disbelief. He thought that Ye Tian's palace was an emperor-level palace, but now it seems that he underestimated Ye Tian.

This is definitely a supreme level palace above the emperor level, and it is also the top supreme level palace. Ye Tian's fighting skills and the use of physical strength are far beyond his imagination.

Ye Tian is definitely some unimaginable powerful being who has taken over the body. He didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian. Now it's too late to regret.
